title: Dolce & Gabbana
description: Exclusive custom project for Dolce & Gabbana. Hand-painted accessories for the brand's VIP clients.

details.task: Create exclusive custom accessories for VIP clients.
details.solution: Developed a premium design using techniques that match the brand's level of craftsmanship.
details.result: All pieces were presented to the brand's VIP clients at a private event.
